message:
fix: use sudo for env file writes in dashboard (#116)

/etc/hive/*.env files are root-owned but the dashboard server runs as
dev user. Switch setEnvFlag/removeEnvFlag from fs.writeFileSync to
sudo sed/tee, and lock file ops from fs.writeFileSync/unlinkSync to
sudo touch/rm. Fixes "permission denied" toast when pinning from UI.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
